announcements.content: Due to cost factors, the gpt basic group multiplier has been increased from 0.15 to 0.20. After the subscription discount, the actual multiplier is approximately 0.13.

Regarding the current multiplier and pricing issues for the pro group, we have not yet adjusted subscriptions, so the current pro at a 0.5 multiplier works out to roughly 0.33 after converting the subscription. As for the specific price, after a trial run for a period of time, if the costs are manageable, we will make the corresponding price reduction. However, in the end it should not be lower than the current subscription price, and both the original multiplier and the subscription discount may be adjusted.

We have officially launched the Pro group (multiplier temporarily set at 0.5). After launch, we will dynamically adjust the multiplier based on costs and service quality. At the same time, in order to respond to the constantly changing cost structure, we may make corresponding optimizations to the calculation rules for subscription quotas in the near future. Please rest assured that this adjustment will only take effect for new subscriptions. The subscription benefits and quota you have already purchased will not be affected in any way, so please feel free to continue using them.

Due to ongoing crackdowns by OpenAI, it has become difficult for us to provide a stable service at our current pricing. As a result, we may soon increase the multiplier for the basic GPT group to an estimated 0.2. Additionally, we are planning to launch a Pro group with a multiplier tentatively set at 0.5. Please note that these rates are subject to change depending on the strictness of OpenAI's detection and banning mechanisms, and the Pro group might not launch at all if the risk control measures become too severe. For users who cannot accept the price increase, please apply for a refund by following the refund instructions in the announcement history below.

Regarding subscription issues, if your subscription quota expired before being fully used due to instability in our service, please rest assured that we will subsequently compensate you with the corresponding quota.

At present, it seems that the gpt channel may still be unable to provide a stable supply in the near term. It is recommended to prioritize using cc. For those who cannot wait, please apply for a refund according to the instructions in the historical announcements below.
It will probably still crash, and it likely won’t be long now. We will continue looking for a solution.
Our GPT channel supply capacity is steadily recovering. Once stability is confirmed, we will carry out a compensation package distribution plan (if it can remain stable).
We are still continuing to resolve the gpt supply issue, and some load has now been restored.

Due to the impact of openai's ban policy, we are currently unable to provide gpt at this price. We will work hard to find a solution, but it may take some time. If you cannot wait, or if you previously topped up due to factors such as the price, we are willing to provide a corresponding refund based on your usage. However, the refund processing period cannot be guaranteed and is expected to take about one month. If you need to apply for a refund, please send an email directly to xxx, and we will register it. At the same time, please provide your preferred payment method and the corresponding payment QR code, and also provide your site ID. During the refund process, your account will be frozen for statistical purposes.
gpt渠道仍在抢救中，待供应稳定后，我们会公布补偿事宜，很抱歉为您带来不便

The gpt channel is currently under excessive pressure, and we are doing our best to resolve it. We apologize for the inconvenience. Before we can ensure a stable and sufficient supply, we have temporarily taken gpt-image-2 offline.
The aws-kiro pay-as-you-go channel has been restored. Due to cost impacts, the multiplier has been increased from 0.3 to 0.5.
The cc group has launched the claude-fable-5 model. This model is expensive; please use it with caution.
The aws kiro channel has been restored, but stability cannot be guaranteed for now

We have configured a shortcut jump for the drawing feature. After creating a token that can use gpt-image-2, expand the ··· on the right, click Chat, then click Drawing to jump to the drawing website and configure it with one click to start using it.
Due to channel supply issues, the aws kiro channel is temporarily offline

We have reduced the price of claude on the aws channel, lowering the multiplier from 0.7 to 0.3.
At the same time, the ccmax account pool groups have been launched, with multipliers of 1.5 and 1.6 respectively, approximately 22% and 24% of the official price. We recommend prioritizing the groups that are only available in claudecode.

We have upgraded the subscription feature. You can now enable auto-renewal for subscriptions, which will automatically renew when a subscription is about to expire or be used up. When enabling this feature, please ensure that your on-site balance is sufficient to avoid response interruptions caused by failed auto-renewal. In addition, changes to the configuration of the number of simultaneously active instances of a subscription type will take effect immediately, so please avoid accidentally setting too many subscriptions

Due to openai temporarily taking gpt-5.4 offline in the early hours, our cooldown mechanism was triggered, causing the gpt-5.4 model to remain unavailable. It has now been fixed. We apologize for the inconvenience.
OpenAI has stopped supplying gpt-5.2 and gpt-5.3-codex through this channel, and we will remove the model tonight.
openai will stop supplying gpt-5.2 and gpt-5.3-codex through this channel in early June. Users who are still using them are advised to migrate in advance.

Please do not use this site's GPT official relay service for malicious cybersecurity activities. OpenAI officially conducts cybersecurity checks on related conversations. After multiple risk flags, responses may become slower due to additional security checks, and accounts may also be restricted. For users who frequently trigger such checks, this site may take measures such as reminders, rate limiting, service suspension, or bans to ensure the normal experience of other users.
Due to a configuration error, the price for previous requests to some models (gpt-5.2) was abnormal. The base price has now been raised to the official listed price.
Due to upstream business changes, the Alibaba Cloud channel is temporarily offline
Since openai has stopped supplying gpt-5.3-codex, we have currently redirected gpt-5.3-codex to avoid service disruption. Users who are using this model are advised to migrate as soon as possible.

To celebrate the number of registered users on the site surpassing 1,000, we have launched a check-in event. You can receive up to $2 in credit by checking in daily. Visit your profile page: https://api.avemujica.moe/profile to check in and claim it. After claiming, you will automatically receive a check-in credit subscription package. Set it as the priority subscription on the wallet page to use it.

The image API now supports returning images in webp format, which can effectively improve response speed. When calling it, simply specify the corresponding return format parameter as webp. Currently, if no format is provided, webp is also returned by default.
For users using cherry-studio or similar software, please do not use image models directly in the chat API. Please enable the drawing feature and select a drawing model to use.

To facilitate multi-channel management, the bonus credits for new users have been converted into an equivalent subscription credit package. Existing users are not affected. New users should note that they need to change the usage method in the wallet to prioritize subscriptions.
The official Alibaba Cloud Bailian 40% off channel is now online, supporting mainstream flagship domestic models such as K2.6 and GLM5.1. Select the Bailian group when creating a token to use it.
The website will soon undergo maintenance and upgrades, expected to be completed within a few minutes. There may be brief connection interruptions during this time. Thank you for your understanding.

The image generation channel has been adjusted and now supports 4k output. It is recommended to use the api-cn node when generating images, as the main node cannot currently guarantee a stable connection.
Updated the subscription purchase logic to calculate limits based on actually activated subscriptions

The aws channel for claude is now live and supports invocation within claude code. When creating a token, please select the aws group. This group has a multiplier of 0.7, approximately 10% of the official price. Stable supply capacity for this channel is not guaranteed for now.
Update: Subscriptions can now be purchased directly using your on-site balance

Website maintenance and upgrades are expected to take place from 2:00 to 2:30, during which the quota will also be uniformly updated. Requests may be interrupted during this period. We apologize for any inconvenience caused. After the update, you may need to log in to the website again, but api calls will not be affected. (The update has been completed. If you encounter any issues, please contact us by email.)

To unify access and management across multiple providers, we will soon simplify quota/subscription top-ups by standardizing them to 1:1 top-ups, and adjust the current groups to 0.15x multiplier groups. Subscription quotas will also be adjusted to match the previous 0.1x multiplier. This is expected to be completed automatically within the next few days. Your quota and groups will be automatically updated to avoid interrupting existing service operations.

Some friends may still be using traditional chatweb/chatapp tools. We highly recommend that you try OpenAI’s official codex-app: https://get.microsoft.com/installer/download/9PLM9XGG6VKS?cid=website_cta_psi (of course, those who write code may feel that codex-cli is already great). There is also a document on the site for configuration reference: https://docs.avemujica.moe/cli/3-codex After installation, open the app, and codex/gpt can directly complete your work for you on your computer 😊

The purchase limit for daily card subscriptions has been adjusted. You can now hold 5 daily cards at the same time, but the days will not be stacked; instead, you will receive new independent quotas. Each subscription still needs to be used up within 1 day. The intention is not for you to stockpile too much quota, but to purchase and use it when needed.

OpenAI officially conducts cybersecurity checks on conversation content. Once a conversation is flagged as a cybersecurity issue, it will keep returning errors and can no longer be used. This is not something this site can control. If you do have cybersecurity needs, please contact the business email: xxx

Image generation tasks for gpt-image-2 may require a longer processing time and may experience timeouts or request interruptions due to Cloudflare infrastructure limitations. Therefore, we do not currently guarantee stable availability of this model. If you do need to generate images, you can use https://api-cn.avemujica.moe as the baseurl
Contact Information\xxx Abuse\xxx Support Tickets\xxx Business Cooperation

faq.answer:
## Pricing Explanation

This site uses a **1:1 top-up** rule, and the base prices of models are configured according to official prices.

Therefore, the actual discount calculation methods for different models are as follows:

- **International models**: The actual discount is approximately `multiplier ÷ 7`; the specific result may be affected by exchange rate fluctuations.
- **Domestic models**: The actual discount is the multiplier set in the backend.

Example:

```text
International model multiplier 3.5 ≈ actual 50% discount
Domestic model multiplier 0.5 = actual 50% discount
faq.question: How is the discount calculated?

faq.answer:
We recommend using it in **Codex** for the most complete and smooth experience.

Setup instructions: [Codex Configuration Guide](https://docs.avemujica.moe/cli/3-codex)

For everyday use, we recommend installing the **Codex App**:

[Download Codex App](https://get.microsoft.com/installer/download/9PLM9XGG6VKS?cid=website_cta_psi)

If you mainly use it for coding, you can also use **Codex CLI**:

```bash
npm install -g @openai/codex
```

If you prefer **Claude Code**, you can also configure the site’s API based on client support.

For users who work with multiple tools such as Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI, or who do not want to maintain configuration files manually, we recommend using **CC Switch** for unified management. CC Switch supports centralized management of Provider, MCP, Skills, Prompt, and other configurations, and also makes it easier to switch between different model services.

Learn more: [CC Switch Official Site](https://cc-switch.cc)
faq.question: How to use?

faq.answer: We are currently prioritizing the availability of gpt; availability for other channels is not guaranteed at this time.
faq.question: Channel Supply Issues

faq.answer: OpenAI officially has a hard context limit for gpt-5.5 on this channel. It is recommended not to let your context exceed 258k. If you need a long context, please use gpt-5.4.
faq.question: Why do 500 errors keep occurring?

faq.answer: For image generation, it is recommended to use api-eo.avemujica.moe as the endpoint. The main node is affected by CF's maximum timeout limit, so image generation stability cannot be guaranteed for the time being.
faq.question: The image generation model keeps reporting errors?

faq.answer:
This site provides an official GPT forwarding service. Please do not use it for malicious cybersecurity activities.

OpenAI’s official systems perform cybersecurity checks on sessions. If `cyber_policy` is returned, it may lead to slower responses, additional checks, or account restrictions.

## Disclaimer

This site does not read or store conversations. It only uses event error codes or exception types returned by OpenAI to warn, rate limit, or block frequent abuse.

References: [cyber_policy](https://github.com/openai/codex/blob/12bfb57139f169c1a1822d57a6fdb2a3d08e0c53/codex-rs/codex-api/src/sse/responses.rs#L529-L535), [slowdown notice](https://github.com/openai/codex/blob/12bfb57139f169c1a1822d57a6fdb2a3d08e0c53/codex-rs/tui/src/chatwidget.rs#L189-L195)
